message:
feat(web): Overhaul CSS design system for premium UI quality

Major improvements to achieve Stripe-level UI polish:

- Create components.css with comprehensive layout classes
  (two-column, list, detail-card, metrics, sequence-block, etc.)
- Refine color palette from harsh neon to sophisticated tones
- Add background elevation system for depth hierarchy
- Implement responsive breakpoints at 640px, 768px, 1024px
- Add touch device optimizations for mobile
- Enhance glass morphism effects in header/footer
- Make CRT overlay effects more subtle and less distracting
- Improve accessibility with enhanced high contrast mode
- Fix animation timing variable conflicts
- Add proper print styles

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
